activities_projects.title: Critical Theme Evaluation
activities_projects.objective: To critically evaluate the theme of scientific inquiry
steps: Analyse the theme of science and curiosity
Support your evaluation with incidents from the lesson

activities_projects.title: Failure as a Turning Point
activities_projects.objective: To analyse failure as a motivator
steps: Identify Ebright’s failure at the science fair
Explain how it shaped his future success

activities_projects.title: Scientific Temper Analysis
steps: Identify traits of scientific temper in Ebright
Explain with textual evidence

activities_projects.title: Role of Environment in Success
steps: Analyse the role of family and teachers
Explain how environment shaped Ebright

activities_projects.title: Extended Character Analysis
steps: Analyse Richard Ebright’s character traits
Support with multiple examples

activities_projects.title: Message Relevance Today
steps: Identify the message of the lesson
Explain its relevance to students today

activities_projects.title: Science vs Memorisation
activities_projects.objective: To distinguish real learning from rote learning
steps: Compare Ebright’s learning style with rote learning
Write your analysis

activities_projects.title: Interpretation of the Title
steps: Analyse the title of the lesson
Justify it with strong arguments

activities_projects.title: Lessons for Young Learners
steps: Identify lessons students can learn
Explain how they can be applied

activities_projects.title: Project: Scientist Profile Study
activities_projects.objective: To apply lesson ideas through research
steps: Select a scientist of your choice
Study their life and struggles
Compare with Richard Ebright’s journey
